backward_compatibility.rationale: This is a data quality fix — the old behavior (accepting wrong moves as correct) is a bug, not a feature. Old code updated in place.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: No deprecated path exists — this is additive logic to existing correctness.py.

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous governance selection. Backend pipeline fix with structural sibling heuristic. Fixes data at source, all downstream consumers benefit automatically, architecture-compliant.
